meaning: River 澜沧江[中国西南地区](旧译Lantsang)
examples: The race took place in the lancang river.
The Lancang River Big Canyon shows a variety of features.
They decided to begin their trip from the beginning of the Lancang River.
But in China, hydropower dams on the Lancang (upper Mekong) will operate to store part of the monsoon flow and release it during the dry season.
